active_direction.summary: Reuse the Bmk-dev SpecBench workflow for full multi-file reconstruction benchmark development.
active_direction.candidate_visibility_rule: Candidate agents may see only the public packet/spec for a task.

repo_pool_policy: Check upstream Bmk-dev REPO_POOL.md before starting a source repository. Do not duplicate qualified, in-progress, pending, retired, or out-of-scope sources without explicit user override.
